message:
Add comprehensive thread safety tests for rich_rust

- Compile-time Send + Sync verification for all public types
- Concurrent cache access tests for Color, Style, and cell_len caches
- Parallel rendering tests for Text, Table, Panel, ProgressBar, Rule, Tree
- Mixed concurrent operations stress test
- Cache consistency verification under concurrent access

Note: Console is intentionally Send-only (not Sync) due to RefCell usage
for the output stream - this is documented and tested.

All 20 tests verify thread safety of the library's core functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
